name: Bayerische Vanillecreme (Bavarian Vanilla Cream)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water to soften.
2. Heat until the gelatin is completely dissolved.
3. Mix together sugar and cornstarch in a separate bowl.
4. Add eggs; beat for 2 minutes.
5. Slowly add warm milk while beating constantly.
6. Pour mixture into a 1-quart saucepan.
7. Cook over medium heat until the custard coats a spoon.
8. Stir in gelatin and vanilla ice cream when the custard is hot.
9. Cool slightly, then stir in vanilla extract.
10. Gently fold in whipped cream.
11. Pour into a 1-quart mold and chill until set.
12. Unmold carefully and serve with fresh fruit garnish.
